scripts.generate: python3 scripts/render_pyi.py && python3 scripts/render_examples.py && cargo test -p mistralrs-cli --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml regenerate_cli_reference -- --ignored && cargo test -p mistralrs-server-core --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml regenerate_openapi -- --ignored && cargo test -p mistralrs-core --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml regenerate_supported_models -- --ignored
